All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

A

Alien - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Represents one alien enemy on the grid.
Alien(float, float, int) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Creates an alien at the given position with the given type.
ALIEN_COLS - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Number of columns in the alien grid.
ALIEN_DROP - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Pixels droped down when aliens reach the edge.
ALIEN_H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Height of the alien sprite box.
ALIEN_ROWS - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Number of rows in the alien grid.
ALIEN_STEP - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Horizontal pixels moved per movement tick.
ALIEN_W - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Width of the alien sprite box.
Alien.Bomb - Class in io.github.javainvaders
A bomb droped by an alien.
Alien.Boss - Class in io.github.javainvaders
The level-3 boss.
Alien.RadialBomb - Class in io.github.javainvaders
A bomb fired by the boss that travels outward at a fixed angle instead of straight down.
alienDescend - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.AlienMoveState
True when aliens should drop down on the next tick.
alienDirX - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.AlienMoveState
Current horizontal movement direction, +1 or -1.
alienMoveInterval - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Time between alien movement ticks - decreases with level.
alienMoveState - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Mutable alien movement state (direction and descend flag).
AlienMoveState - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Tiny bag of mutable alien movement state.
AlienMoveState(float) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.AlienMoveState
Creates the state with an initial direction.
alienMoveTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Countdown until aliens take another step.
aliens - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
The alien grid.
alive - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Whether this alien is still in play.
alive - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Whether the boss is still alive.
alive - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Whether the ship is currently active on screen.
allAliensDead(Array<Alien>) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Returns true when every alien in the list is dead.
allPlayersDead(Player, Player) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Returns true when both players are dead with no lives remaining.
angle - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.RadialBomb
Accumulated rotation angle for the spin visual.
awardLevelBonus(Player, Player, int, int[]) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Awards the level-completion bonus to any player that is alive or has lives left.

B

batch - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Batch for drawing HUD text.
batch - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Batch for drawing sprites and text.
batch - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Batch for drawing text.
bigFont - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Large font for titles and game-over messages.
bigFont - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Larger font for titles and big messages.
blinkInterval - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Controls how fast the ship flickers on and off.
blinkTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Total time the blink animation still runs for.
blinkVisible - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Whether the ship is visible on the current blink frame.
bobOffset - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Vertical offset on top of BOSS_TARGET_Y - oscillates via sine.
bobTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Accumulated time used to drive the sine-wave vertical bob.
Bomb(float, float) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
Creates a bomb at the given position (usually the bottom of an alien).
BOMB_H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
Height of the bomb sprite.
BOMB_SPEED - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
How fast bombs fall downward in pixels per second.
BOMB_W - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
Width of the bomb sprite.
bombInterval - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
How often a bomb drops in seconds - decreases with level.
bombs - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
All bombs currently falling.
bombTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Countdown until the next bomb is droped.
bonusAwarded - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Bonus points awarded to each player at level end.
boss - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Boss for level 3 - null until all normal aliens are dead.
Boss(int) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Creates a boss that starts above the visible screen and descends to its patrol height.
BOSS_BOB_AMP - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Amplitude of the vertical bob in pixels.
BOSS_BOB_SPEED - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Full bob cycles per second.
BOSS_BURST_COUNT - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Number of bombs in each radial burst.
BOSS_DEATH_FLASH_INTERVAL - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Duration of each flash half-cycle in seconds.
BOSS_DEATH_FLASHES - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
How many times the boss flashes during its death sequence.
BOSS_DEATH_FREEZE_DURATION - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Seconds the boss holds as a white silhouette before the final explosion.
BOSS_ENTRY_SPEED - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Downward entry speed from the top of the screen.
BOSS_EXPLOSION_OFFSETS - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Explosion offsets used during the boss death animation.
BOSS_FIRE_INTERVAL - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Seconds between radial bomb bursts.
BOSS_H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Height of the boss sprite.
BOSS_MAX_HP - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
How many bullets it takes to destroy the boss.
BOSS_SCORE - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Points awarded for killing the boss.
BOSS_SPEED_X - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Horizontal drift speed once it reaches its target Y.
BOSS_TARGET_Y - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Y position where the boss stops descending.
BOSS_W - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Width of the boss sprite - roughly 13.5x a normal alien.
bossExplosionIndex - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Index of the next offset to use in the boss death explosion sequence.
bossExplosionTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Timer that paces explosions during the boss death animation.
Bullet(float, float, int) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Creates a bullet at the given position for the given player.
BULLET_H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Bullet height in pixels.
BULLET_SPEED - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Upward travel speed in pixels per second.
BULLET_W - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Bullet width in pixels.
bullets - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
All bullets currently flying.

C

camera - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Camera that maps game coords to screen coords.
canSave(Game) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Save
Returns true when the game state is safe to persist.
checkCollisions() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Checks bullet/alien, bomb/player and alien/player collisions.
cleanUp() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Removes explosions whose timer has run out.
create() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
 
currentScreen - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Which screen is currently active - also written by Screen callbacks.

D

deathFlashesLeft - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
How many flash half-cycles remain in the death sequence.
deathFlashTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Countdown for each individual flash half-cycle.
deathFreezeTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Countdown for the frozen-silhouette phase.
deathFrozen - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
True when all flashes are done and the boss is held as a solid white silhouette for BOSS_DEATH_FREEZE_DURATION before the final explosion.
deathSequenceDone - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
True once the death sequence is fully over and the game can award the score, spawn the explosion and proceed to YOU WIN.
deathVisible - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Whether the boss sprite is visible during a death-flash off-frame.
dirX - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Current horizontal movement direction, +1 or -1.
dispose() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
 
draw(ShapeRenderer) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Draws the boss using shape primitives.
drawAlien(Alien, ShapeRenderer) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Draws an alien using shape primitives.
drawHUD(SpriteBatch, BitmapFont, Player, Player, int, float, int, int) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Draws the HUD: scores, level label, save hint and the fading "Saved!" message.
drawLives(Player, float, float, Color, ShapeRenderer) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Draws small ship icons for each remaining life.
drawShip(Player, Color, ShapeRenderer) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Draws the ship body and wings using shape primitives.
dropBomb() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Picks a random alive alien to drop a bomb.
dying - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
True once the boss reaches zero HP and the death sequence begins.

E

entering - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
True while the boss is still entering from the top.
EXIT - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.MenuAction
 
EXIT_GAME - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.PauseAction
 
EXIT_TO_MENU - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.PauseAction
 
Explosion(float, float) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Main.Explosion
Creates an explosion at the given position with a fixed duration.
explosions - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Active explosion animations.

F

fireBurst(Array<Alien.Bomb>) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
 
fireTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Countdown to the next bomb burst.
font - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Regular font for HUD text.
font - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Regular-size font for HUD.
font - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Font used for most text.

G

game - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Owns the gameplay loop, entities and rendering.
Game - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Core gameplay class.
Game(Main, SpriteBatch, ShapeRenderer, BitmapFont) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Creates the Game and grabs the shared rendering resources from Main.

GAMEPLAY - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.State
 

H

H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Game window height in pixels.
H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Screen height in pixels.
handleMenu(float, Game) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Handles the full main-menu frame: reads input, calls startNewGame or loadGame on the game instance, then renders the menu.
handlePause(float, Game) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Handles the full pause frame: reads input, updates game screen state and draws the overlay on top of the frozen game.
hit() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Registers a bullet hit.
hitFlashTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Timer for the hit-flash effect.
hp - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Remaining hit points.

I

index - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Which player this is: 1 or 2.
initialShootTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Short grace period at level start so holding shoot doesnt instantly fire.
initLevel() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Initialises (or re-initialises) the current level.
io.github.javainvaders - package io.github.javainvaders
 

K

killPlayer(Player, Array<Main.Explosion>) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Marks a player as dead and starts the respawn blink animation.

L

level - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Current level number (1-3).
LEVEL_COMPLETE - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.State
 
levelBonus(int) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Returns the level-completion bonus for the given level.
levelCompleteTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Countdown shown on the level-complete screen.
lives - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
How many lives this player still has.
LOAD_GAME - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.MenuAction
 
loadConfig(JsonValue) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
Loads bomb config values from JSON data.
loadConfig(JsonValue) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Loads boss config values from JSON data.
loadConfig(JsonValue) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Loads alien config values from JSON data.
loadConfig(JsonValue) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.RadialBomb
Loads radial bomb config values from JSON data.
loadConfig(JsonValue) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Loads bullet config values from JSON data.
loadConfig(JsonValue) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Loads player config values from JSON data.
loadConfig(JsonValue) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Save
Loads save config values from JSON data.
loaded - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Set during loadGame so initLevel doesnt reset the loaded player state.
loadGame(Game) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Save
Reads the save file and restores game state into the given Game instance.

M

main - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Reference back to main so we can flip currentScreen.
Main - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Entry point for Java Invaders.

MAIN_MENU - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.State
 
Main.Explosion - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Tiny data class for a timed explosion animation.
MenuAction() - Constructor for enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.MenuAction
 
menuSelection - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Currently highlighted option in the main menu (0-2).
moveAliens(Array<Alien>, AlienMoveState, int, int) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Moves every alive alien one step sideways, or drops them down if alienDescend is true.

O

owner - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Player index who fired this bullet — used for scoring.

P

p1 - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Player one (cyan ship).
p2 - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Player two (lime ship).

PauseAction() - Constructor for enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.PauseAction
 
pauseSelection - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Currently highlighted option in the pause menu (0-2).
Player - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Represents a player ship.
Player(int, float) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Creates a new player at the given x position.
Player.Bullet - Class in io.github.javainvaders
A bullet fired by a player ship.
pointsForAlien(int) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Returns how many points an alien of the given type is worth.
PTS_TYPE0 - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Points for a type-0 (basic) alien kill.
PTS_TYPE1 - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Points for a type-1 (medium) alien kill.
PTS_TYPE2 - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Points for a type-2 (tough) alien kill.

R

RADIAL_SPEED - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.RadialBomb
Travel speed in pixels per second.
RadialBomb(float, float, float) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.RadialBomb
Creates a radial bomb fired from (x, y) in the given direction.
rect() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
Returns the hitbox for collision checks against player ships.
rect() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Returns the hitbox for collision checks against player bullets.
rect() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Returns the hitbox for collision checks against bullets or the player.
rect() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Returns the hitbox for collision checks.
rect() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Returns the hitbox used for collision detection.
render() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
 
renderGame() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Draws the full gameplay frame: ships, aliens, bullets, bombs, HUD.
renderGameOver(boolean, int, int) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Draws the game-over or win screen with final scores.
renderLevelComplete(int, int[], float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Draws the level-complete screen with bonus info and a countdown.
renderMenu() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Draws the main menu title and the three options.
renderPause(Runnable) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Renders the pause overlay on top of the frozen game frame.
resetMenuSelection() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Resets the main menu cursor to the top.
resetPauseSelection() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Resets the pause cursor to "RESUME".
respawnTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Countdown before the player respawns after dying.
RESUME - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.PauseAction
 
RNG - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Shared RNG instance used to vary the burst count each fire cycle.

S

Save - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Persists and restores game state to/from a local file.
Save() - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Save
 
SAVE_FILE - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Save
File name written to the app's local storage directory.
saveFeedbackTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Timer driving the "Saved!" feedback text fade.
saveGame(Game) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Save
Writes the current game state to the save file.
score - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Current score.
Score - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Handles score calculation and level bonuses.
Score() - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Score
 
Screen - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Manages all non-gameplay screens: main menu, pause menu, level-complete and game-over.
Screen(BitmapFont, BitmapFont, SpriteBatch, ShapeRenderer) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Creates the screen manager with shared render resources.
Screen.MenuAction - Enum Class in io.github.javainvaders
Actions the main menu can trigger.
Screen.PauseAction - Enum Class in io.github.javainvaders
Actions the pause menu can trigger.
Screen.State - Enum Class in io.github.javainvaders
All posible game states.
screenManager - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Handles all menu and pause rendering and their input.
shakeOffsetX - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Horizontal shake offset applied while dying.
shapes - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Renderer for ships, aliens, bullets, etc.
shapes - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Renderer for shapes (ships, aliens, bullets, etc).
shapes - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Shape renderer for the pause overlay.
shields - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Shields protecting players from bombs.
SHIP_H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Ship height in pixels.
SHIP_SPEED - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Movement speed in pixels per second.
SHIP_W - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Ship width in pixels.
SHOOT_COOLDOWN - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Min time between shots in seconds.
shootTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Countdown before the player can shoot again.
startNewGame() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Starts a fresh game from level 1 with full lives.
State() - Constructor for enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.State
 

T

timer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main.Explosion
Time remaining before the explosion disapears.
type - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Visual and point type: 0 = basic, 1 = medium, 2 = tough.

U

update(float, Array<Alien.Bomb>, int) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss
Updates boss movement, entry descent and the fire timer.
updateGame(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Main update step while in the GAMEPLAY state.
updateGameOver(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Returns true when the player presses ENTER or ESC to leave the game-over screen.
updateLevelComplete(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Handles the level-complete countdown and transitions to the next level or game over.
updateMenu(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Reads keyboard input on the main menu and returns the triggered action.
updatePause(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Reads keyboard input while paused and returns the triggered action.
updatePlayer(Player, float, int, int, int, Array<Player.Bullet>, int, float) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Updates a single player: handles movement input, shoot cooldown and respawn blink.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.MenuAction
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

values() - Static method in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.MenuAction

Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.State
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
vx - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.RadialBomb
Normalised X component of the travel direction.
vy - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.RadialBomb

x - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Boss

x - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Horizontal center of this alien.
x - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main.Explosion

x - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet

x - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player

Y

y - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb

y - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien

y - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main.Explosion

y - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet

y - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
